zh.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan是Jehu Sullivan和Sullivan的女兒，於大約1816年出生在美國南卡羅來納州。她於大約1832年與John Alexander Magby在美國阿拉巴馬州結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普。她去世於1859年8月在美國阿肯色州克拉克享年44歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓比阿頓 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan是Jehu Sullivan和Sullivan的女儿，于大约1816年出生在美国南卡罗来纳州。她于大约1832年与John Alexander Magby在美国亚拉巴马州结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国阿肯色州卡羅爾達爾 堂史普。她去世于1859年8月在美国阿肯色州克拉克享年44岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林比阿頓比阿頓 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
Historical Boundaries 1819: Clark, Missouri Territory, United States 1819: Clark, Arkansas Territory, United States 1836: Clark, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: Fort Sumter Constructed
historicEvents.description: In 1829 Fort Sumter is constructed in the Charleston Harbor, South Carolina. Fort Sumter is most known for being the site of the first shots of the Civil War. It is barely ready when the American Civil War starts.
Historical Boundaries - 1829: Hot Spring, Arkansas Territory, United States; 1836: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries -  1848: Clark, Arkansas, United States;  1873: Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States

en.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan was born about 1816, in South Carolina, United States as the daughter of Jehu Sullivan and Sullivan. She married John Alexander Magby about 1832, in Alabama, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She lived in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, United States in 1850. She died in August 1859, in Clark, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 44, and was buried in Beaton Cemetery, Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle a vécu à Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1850. Elle est décédée en août 1859, à Clark, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaton Cemetery, Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan wurde um 1816 in South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten, als Tochter von Jehu Sullivan und Sullivan geboren. Sie hat um 1832 in Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten John Alexander Magby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1850 hat sie in Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb im August 1859 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Clark, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Beaton Cemetery, Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivanは約1816年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州でJehu SullivanとSullivanの娘として生まれた。約1832年にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州でJohn Alexander Magbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州カーロルセダー トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼女は1859年8月にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークで44歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビートンビートン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Valley Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, U: 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 발리 타운시프

ko.Cedar, Clark, Arkansas: 미국 아칸소 주 카로 세더르 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan(은)는 대략 1816년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주에서 Jehu Sullivan(와)과 Sullivan의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1832년 미국 앨라배마 주에서 John Alexander Magby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 아칸소 주 카로 세더르 타운시프에서 살았다. 그녀는 1859년 8월 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스프링 비턴 비턴 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan nasceu aproximadamente 1816, em Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América filha de Jehu Sullivan e Sullivan. Ela casou-se com John Alexander Magby aproximadamente 1832, em Alabama, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela viveu em Cedar Township, Carroll, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1859, em Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Beaton Cemetery, Beaton, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan родилась около 1816 г. в местности Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. Её родителей звали Jehu Sullivan и Sullivan. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Alexander Magby около 1832 г. в местности Алабама, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она жила в местности кедар тоуншип, карролл, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Она умерла август 1859 г. в местности кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности битон кеметири, битон, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Francis C Sullivan nació aproximadamente 1816, en Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos como hija de Jehu Sullivan y Sullivan. Se casó con John Alexander Magby aproximadamente 1832, en Alabama, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Cedar Township, Carroll, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió en agosto de 1859, en Clark, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Beaton Cemetery, Beaton, Hot Spring, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
